verses.text: Having these promises, 'let us cleanse ourselves from all filthiness,' perfecting holiness. Pursue holiness. The promises move us to purity.
Having these promises, 'let us cleanse ourselves from all filthiness,' perfecting holiness. Pursue holiness. The promises move us to purity.
I have great joy in you; in Macedonia we had no rest, 'without were fightings, within were fears.' Troubled yet hopeful. He confesses his anxious labours.
I have great joy in you; in Macedonia we had no rest, 'without were fightings, within were fears.' Troubled yet hopeful. He confesses his anxious labours.
I have great joy in you; in Macedonia we had no rest, 'without were fightings, within were fears.' Troubled yet hopeful. He confesses his anxious labours.
God comforted us 'by the coming of Titus' and your earnest desire. Comfort by friends. God consoles us through one another.
God comforted us 'by the coming of Titus' and your earnest desire. Comfort by friends. God consoles us through one another.
Though my letter made you sorry, I rejoice, for 'ye sorrowed to repentance.' Fruitful sorrow. Their grief led them to turn from sin.
Though my letter made you sorry, I rejoice, for 'ye sorrowed to repentance.' Fruitful sorrow. Their grief led them to turn from sin.
'Godly sorrow worketh repentance to salvation'; the world's sorrow worketh death. Two sorrows. Only grief toward God brings life.
'Godly sorrow worketh repentance to salvation'; the world's sorrow worketh death. Two sorrows. Only grief toward God brings life.
I wrote that our care might appear; we joyed in the joy of Titus. Mutual gladness. Their repentance gladdened all.
I wrote that our care might appear; we joyed in the joy of Titus. Mutual gladness. Their repentance gladdened all.
My boasting of you was true; 'I have confidence in you in all things.' Restored trust. He rejoices in their renewed obedience.
My boasting of you was true; 'I have confidence in you in all things.' Restored trust. He rejoices in their renewed obedience.
